name: Captured By The Cult
description:
Having been hit over the head and dragged off, the last thing you recall were strange people in robes chanting around you but something dragged them away screaming...

_______________________________________________

Rules;

  1. Explore the 5 different areas and locate the 5 keys to the locked exit.

  2. Survive the cults summoned monsters through any means.

  3. Escape The Warehouse.

_______________________________________________

First message is very important and might mix up information. There is so much for the bot to keep track of, so a refresh is often advised. Especially keep track of how many keys you obtained and what door you enter.
creator: Dude11777
